dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates exceptional governance integration through the 'rules-context-loader' (4,514 completion tokens) and a dedicated 'alignment-engine' step. All governance-related schemas passed validation, indicating strict adherence to the architectural guardrails defined in the project context.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' span is extraordinarily detailed, utilizing 65,236 completion tokens. This suggests an exhaustive causal analysis of how specific architectural changes impact the long-term evolution of the system, far exceeding the baseline complexity.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The orchestration flow explicitly separates the mapping of work from the alignment and intent generation phases. This structure allows for the identification of tensions during the mapping phase which are then systematically resolved in the 'alignment-engine' and 'architecture-intent-generator' steps.
